summary_en: Jackie Reyes Yanes is proud to receive the endorsement of the Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC) — a leading voice for the construction industry, skilled trades, and workforce development across our region. This endorsement reflects a shared commitment to strengthening our local economy by investing in people, expanding access to opportunity, and building the workforce needed for the future of Washington, DC.
summary:
Jackie Reyes Yanes is proud to receive the endorsement of the Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC) — a leading voice for the construction industry, skilled trades, and workforce development across our region.

This endorsement reflects a shared commitment to strengthening our local economy by investing in people, expanding access to opportunity, and building the workforce needed for the future of Washington, DC.
summary_es: Jackie Reyes-Yanes se enorgullece de recibir el respaldo de Associated Builders and Contractors of Metro Washington (ABC), una voz líder en la industria de la construcción, los oficios especializados y el desarrollo de la fuerza laboral en nuestra región. Este respaldo refleja un compromiso compartido con el fortalecimiento de la economía local mediante la inversión en las personas, la ampliación del acceso a oportunidades y la construcción de la fuerza laboral que necesita el futuro de Washington, DC.
title_en: Jackie Reyes Yanes Earns Endorsement from ABC Metro Washington
title_es: Jackie Reyes-Yanes recibe el respaldo de ABC Metro Washington
title: Jackie Reyes Yanes Earns Endorsement from ABC Metro Washington
